title: Phase 3 Gate — 0.6.0 supplemental
description: Phase 3 produces structured decisions (and possibly open questions). Each gap probe the interviewer confirms with the user lands as an ADR in epic.json.decisions[]; unresolved gaps land as OQs in epic.json.open_questions[]. An empty decisions[] at Phase 3 close means nothing was actually probed — block until the interviewer records what was decided.
